name: Lapidoth Capital Ltd
summary: Lapidoth Capital Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, provides drilling and related services in Israel. It operates through International Trade, Distribution of Samsung Mobile Phones, Investments, Oil and Water Drilling, and Prospecting and Production of Oil and Gas segments. The company is involved in the design and operation of onshore oil, gas, and water drilling and production activities; and provision of auxiliary services related to exploration and production, such as drilling, downhole geophysical logging, cementation, perforation, CCTV monitoring, production, petro physics, reservoir engineering, logistics, research drilling, and soil sampling. It also offers wireline equipment and services for oil, gas, and water wells, as well as for mineral and geotechnical boreholes. In addition, the company engages in oil and gas prospecting and production activities. It holds interest in two licenses in the Heletz field located in southern Israel; and in OZ and Arye marine license located in the coast of Netanya. In addition, the company trades in consumer goods, such as apparel, sporting and outdoor goods, footwear, watches, accessories, and jewelry; invests in marketable securities and real-estate properties; provides capital market transactions; and distributes Samsung mobile phones. Lapidoth Capital Ltd was founded in 1959 and is based in Tel Aviv, Israel.
